purpose: A binary toggle for instant on/off settings without explicit save. Provides immediate state change feedback.
whenToUse: When the state takes effect immediately without form submission
whenNotToUse: For actions that need confirmation — use Button
In forms requiring "Save" submission — use CheckBox
For 3+ mutually exclusive options — use Select or RadioButton
doRules: Use Switch for instant binary settings (On/Off)
Use AcceptReject type for explicit approval workflows
Provide a clear label describing what the switch controls
Show feedback when state changes (toast, status update)
dontRules: Do not use Switch for actions that need confirmation — use Button
Do not use Switch in forms requiring "Save" — use CheckBox
Do not omit the descriptive label

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Pair with descriptive Label or use customTextOn/Off
State communicated by position AND color — not color alone

incompatible: Inside a form requiring explicit submit

exceptions: AcceptReject type uses semantic colors (green/red) for approval workflows
